name: Luka Couffaine
description:
Luka Couffaine is a character introduced in the second season of Miraculous: The Tales of Ladybug and Chat Noir.  He is the older twin brother of Juleka Couffaine and the guitarist of Kitty Section. Luka is known to be a very handsome teenager with a tall slim figure.
 He has a Roman nose, pale pink lips, bright cyan eyes, and medium-length black hair with cyan-dyed ends.
creator: Nya.ko_ala
